## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / service endpoint

## Checklist

- [ ] All my commits are cryptographically signed and show as **Verified**
- [ ] All my commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO check passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes (`ruff check src tests`)
- [ ] `make test` passes (all existing + new tests)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test
- [ ] Public API changes are reflected in callers and existing tests
- [ ] New service endpoints are marked `verified` or `experimental` in `endpoints.py`
- [ ] Significant decisions are recorded as an ADR in `docs/adr/`
